## Resource Name
Name of the tool, article, video, or platform.

## URL
Link to the resource.

## Type
- [ ] Tool documentation
- [ ] Article / tutorial
- [ ] YouTube video / course
- [ ] Practice platform
- [ ] Cheatsheet

## Study Plan Relevance
Which month(s) of the study plan does this relate to?

## Why is it valuable?
Brief explanation of why this should be added.
